description.ko: 우주에서 가장 먼 곳, VOID-3가 존재하며 고요하고 압도적인 우주 진공의 아름다움이 펼쳐지는 심연을 탐험합니다.
description.en: An immersive exploration of the furthest reaches of the universe, where the VOID-3 entity dwells within the silent, crushing beauty of the deep cosmic vacuum.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of the VOID-3 structure drifting through a vast cosmic abyss, surrounded by swirling dark matter and vibrant nebulas in deep indigo and violet tones, ethereal starlight filtering through the void, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution, sci-fi concept art.
